summary: Verified Razorpay checkout end-to-end setup. Payment page loads, Pay button triggers /api/payments/create-order successfully, Razorpay TEST modal opens with Test Mode banner visible, and all payment methods (UPI, Cards, EMI, UPI QR with scan code) render correctly. Full UPI success@razorpay simulation could NOT be executed via Playwright due to Razorpay iframe cross-origin sandboxing (mobile/UPI inputs are inside api.razorpay.com iframe protected against automation) — this is a Razorpay security restriction, NOT a bug in the app.
passed: GET /payment?plan=ai_review renders order summary (AI Rizz Score Report, Rs 299)
Pay button (data-testid=pay-now-btn) is visible and clickable
Razorpay SDK loaded from checkout.razorpay.com and modal opened
Test Mode banner visible in modal (diagonal red 'Test Mode' ribbon)
Payment method list rendered: UPI, Cards, EMI, UPI QR
Razorpay iframe attached to DOM as expected
notes_for_user_reported_issue: User's 'cannot complete payment' complaint is likely because Razorpay checkout now REQUIRES mobile number entry on the 'Contact details' step BEFORE showing UPI input. User must enter any 10-digit Indian mobile (e.g. 9999999999) and click Continue, then choose UPI, then enter success@razorpay.

Once mobile is entered, standard test creds work: UPI success@razorpay -> success; UPI failure@razorpay -> failure; Card 4111111111111111 12/30 CVV 123 with OTP 123456 (6-digit) or click 'Success' on Razorpay OTP simulator.

Non-fatal console noise: harmless mixed-content warnings for localhost:* preload images inside Razorpay's own iframe (Razorpay-side, not our app). Also 401s from an unrelated resource on initial load — not blocking checkout.
manual_verification_requested: Ask user to enter a 10-digit test mobile (e.g. 9999999999) on the Contact details step, then proceed to UPI with success@razorpay. Confirm redirect to /loading -> /dashboard.
If user still gets stuck, capture backend logs: tail -n 200 /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log after they click Pay/Verify, and check payments doc status in MongoDB.
action_items: OPTIONAL UX: Pre-fill or pass customer contact/prefill.contact to Razorpay options so user isn't blocked on the mobile step (currently no prefill is sent — see Payment.jsx line 67-83).
Consider adding a small hint on /payment reminding testers that Razorpay will ask for mobile first in Test Mode.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (up to Razorpay modal open — deeper iframe steps require manual)
